answer:
We want to maximize  
\[
\operatorname{Re}\left((75+117i)z+\frac{96+144i}{z}\right)
\]  
given \(|z|=4\).  

Let \(z = 4e^{i\theta}\). Then  
\[
(75+117i)z = (75+117i)\cdot 4e^{i\theta}, \quad \frac{96+144i}{z} = \frac{96+144i}{4e^{i\theta}} = (24+36i)e^{-i\theta}.
\]  
The real part is  
\[
\operatorname{Re}\left(4(75+117i)e^{i\theta} + (24+36i)e^{-i\theta}\right).
\]  
Writing \(e^{i\theta} = \cos\theta + i\sin\theta\) and taking real parts gives  
\[
4(75\cos\theta - 117\sin\theta) + (24\cos\theta + 36\sin
